g.text: K1 contactor: J2 low-current switch drives coil + D5 flyback. K2 bypass: Q1(2N7002 low-side)+Rg/Rgs gate+D6 flyback; MCU drives gate ~500ms after inrush via J9(CTRL). Bucks U1/U2/U3 EN=always-on(verify pullup), U2=DNP. U4/K1/K2 need real part numbers. Provisional F1(BMS)/F4(stepper)/servo-stall/7S.

g.desc: K1 contactor: J2 low-current switch drives coil + D5 flyback. K2 bypass: Q1(2N7002 low-side)+Rg/Rgs gate+D6 flyback; MCU drives gate ~500ms after inrush via J9(CTRL).
